primary_text:
Rachel was losing money on every kilo she sold to Woolworths. So she changed everything.

Now her regenerative beef travels 2-3 days from Kempsey to your door. Not 14-21 days in cold storage.

FarmThru connects 50+ farms directly to Sydney families. No warehouses. No middlemen.

Invest from $50. $5 refundable deposit gets VIP access on Birchal.

Not financial advice. Disclosure document on Birchal before any investment.
headline: Own a piece of the future of food
